title: austroblechnum squamipes
intro: Austroblechnum squamipes, also known as the rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to the subtropical regions of Australia and New Zealand. Austroblechnum squamipes has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems, and can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
